author: doll-agent
content: Verified done. benchmarks/speed_benchmark.py line 181: matmul size_str is 'f"{rows}x{cols}:{cols}x{rows}"' — both matrix shapes encoded with the ':' separator that ShapeSpec::parse in ferray_bench/src/main.rs splits on (lines 78-89). The ShapeSpec carries Vec<Vec<usize>> so multiple operand shapes parse correctly for binary ops. matmul/100x100 dispatch confirmed working in the stat-equiv run.
